[Swiss-Lib] Recruitment : Associate in the ICRC Library (1 year, paid, full-time traineeship)

Charlotte Mohr cmohr at icrc.org
Mon Jun 1 09:21:26 UTC 2026

  • Next message (by thread): [Swiss-Lib] Stelleninserat auf SwissLib
  • Messages sorted by: [ date ] [ thread ] [ subject ] [ author ] 
Dear all,

The International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC) Library is looking for a recent graduate to join our team in Geneva as an Associate for a one-year, full-time, paid traineeship.


  *   Position: ICRC Library Associate
  *   Location: Geneva
  *   Duration: 12 months
  *   Start Date: September 1, 2026
  *   Application Deadline: June 21, 2026

Learn more and apply here: https://careers.icrc.org/job/Geneva-%28GVA%29-ICRC-Library-Associate-32297/1398449133/

For any questions about the job posting, don't hesitate to write to cmohr at icrc.org<mailto:cmohr at icrc.org>.
My colleagues and I look forward to receiving your application, in English or in French.

Best regards,
Charlotte Mohr

Charlotte Mohr
Librarian
Archives and Library Unit


[cid:image002.png at 01DCF1B8.C8247060]

International Committee of the Red Cross
19 avenue de la Paix I 1202 Geneva I Switzerland
Tel. +41 22 730 31 12
